name: ExtensionOperationDefinition_Parameter_AllowedType
title: R5: Allowed sub-type this parameter can have (if type is abstract) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` 0..* `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` 0..* `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` has a context of OperationDefinition.parameter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `OperationDefinition`.
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Allowed sub-type this parameter can have (if type is abstract) (new)
element.comment:
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` has a context of OperationDefinition.parameter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `OperationDefinition`.
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.allowedType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
In previous versions of FHIR, there was an extension for this: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/operationdefinition-allowed-type

element.short: Allowed sub-type this parameter can have (if type is abstract)
element.definition: Support for polymorphic types. If the parameter type is abstract, this element lists allowed sub-types for the parameter.
element.comment: In previous versions of FHIR, there was an extension for this: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/operationdefinition-allowed-type

binding.description: A list of all the types defined in this version of the FHIR specification - Abstract Types, Data Types and Resource Types.
